check_interval.label: Check interval (minutes)
check_interval.description: How often to check for updates automatically, in minutes. Default 360 (6 hours).

enable_flatpak.label: Enable Flatpak updates
enable_flatpak.description: Check for Flatpak package updates. Requires flatpak.

show_count.label: Show update count
show_count.description: Display the number of available updates next to the icon.

icon_glyph.label: Widget icon
icon_glyph.description: The icon glyph displayed in the bar widget.
